allow_instructions: Auto-run read-only repo inspection: git status/diff/log, rg/fd/findstr, read files, scoped pnpm typecheck/lint/test/build for the package being edited.
Auto-run ABYSS verification helpers when the mission is code change: pnpm --filter <pkg> typecheck|lint|test|build, verify-local.ps1 when scoped checks pass first.
Auto-run read-only GitHub CLI: gh pr checks, gh pr view, gh issue list.
block_instructions: Healthcare monorepo (ABYSS). Block auto-approval for: git push/reset/clean, terraform apply/destroy, database migrations, auth changes, .env/secrets access, MCP writes to production, and any edit under packages/sentra/** without explicit Chief GO.
Never auto-run destructive git: git reset, git clean, git push --force, history rewrite, or broad git add.
Never auto-run deployment, docker compose up/down on production stacks, CI/CD writes, or infra changes without explicit Chief GO in chat.
Never auto-run MCP or shell actions that expose secrets, .env values, credentials, PHI, or patient data.
Never auto-edit packages/sentra/** without explicit Chief GO — crown-jewel is review-first.
Never auto-run git push, gh pr merge, gh release, or production-impacting commands.
For MCP tools touching production databases, auth, billing, or external write APIs: require human approval even when allowlisted.
